prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次依次约为4561→6135→5706→4590→5982，整体波动较大，近5年呈现\"升-降-升\"的震荡格局；2025年基准位次约5982名， 较2024年明显后移约1392名，反映当年竞争加剧；该校在广西物理类招生计划2021年161人、2022年169人、2023年169人、2024年170人、2025年172人，呈逐年 小幅递增趋势；2026年计划170人，较2025年减少2人，属轻微缩招，对竞争影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名2021 年第34名、2022年第34名、2023年第34名、2024年第33名、2025年第34名、2026年第34名，排名稳定在中上985水平；2026年声誉评价为\"偏负面\"，主要因实 验室爆炸事故引发校园安全关注；抖音综合热度排名第23位（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上；2023年曾因张雪峰劝退新闻专业言论引发争议，但整体对工科专业报考影响有限；未见明显投档断档记录；土木工程A+（全国顶尖）、机械工程A-、环境科学与工程A-、电气工程A-、风景园林学A-，共5个A-及以上学科；电气工程、机械工程 等与招生大类高度关联，对工科考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度持续高热（2024年热度指数均超74），与重庆 大学工科试验班大类高度匹配，推升报考热度；广西2026年普通高考总人数约39.2万，按近年比例估算物理类约26.9万人，较2025年增加约8500人（+3.3%），考生规模扩大加剧 竞争；重庆大学位于重庆，与广西同属西南地区，地理距离较近，对广西考 生有天然地域吸引力；该校在广西招生占比约2%-3%，属中等偏上水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次5982名、2026年物理类轻微缩招（-2人）、广西物理类考生增加约3 .3%以及工科热门专业持续高热等因素，竞争压力略有上升，结合考生规模扩大和工科热度做小幅上调修正，预测2026年最低位次约5980名，区间5480–64 80名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 4561 → 6135 → 5706 → 4590 → 5982, showing significant fluctuation and an 'up-down-up' oscillation pattern over the past five years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 5982, a notable drop of about 1392 positions compared to 2024, reflecting intensified competition that year; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guangxi was 161 in 2021, 169 in 2022, 169 in 2023, 170 in 2024, and 172 in 2025, showing a slight annual increase; the 2026 plan is 170, a decrease of 2 from 2025, indicating a minor enrollment reduction with limited impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; on the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, it ranked 34th in 2021, 34th in 2022, 34th in 2023, 33rd in 2024, 34th in 2025, and 34th in 2026, maintaining a stable position among mid-to-upper tier 985 universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is 'somewhat negative,' mainly due to a laboratory explosion accident raising campus safety concerns; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 23rd (relatively popular), with moderate-to-high short video exposure; in 2023, there was controversy due to Zhang Xuefeng's advice against journalism majors, but overall impact on engineering major applications is limited; no significant enrollment gaps recorded; Civil Engineering A+ (top nationally), Mechanical Engineering A-, Environmental Science and Engineering A-, Electrical Engineering A-, Landscape Architecture A-, totaling 5 A- or above disciplines; Electrical Engineering and Mechanical Engineering are highly related to enrollment categories, strongly attracting engineering students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communications, and Electrical Engineering remain highly popular (popularity index over 74 in 2024), closely matching Chongqing University's Engineering Experimental Class categories, boosting application enthusiasm; Guangxi's total number of regular college entrance exam takers in 2026 is about 392,000, with an estimated 269,000 in Physics Category based on recent proportions, an increase of about 8,500 (+3.3%) compared to 2025, intensifying competition due to the larger candidate pool; Chongqing University is located in Chongqing, which, like Guangxi, is in the Southwest region, offering geographical proximity and natural appeal to Guangxi candidates; the university's enrollment share in Guangxi is about 2%-3%, at an upper-moderate level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 5982, a slight enrollment reduction in Physics Category for 2026 (-2), an increase of about 3.3% in Guangxi Physics Category candidates, and sustained high popularity of engineering majors, competition pressure is slightly elevated; with adjustments for the expanded candidate pool and engineering popularity, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 5980, with a range of 5480–6480.

- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Architecture (Architecture, Urban and Rural Planning, Landscape Architecture).

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

- Engineering Experimental Class (Medical-Engineering Intersection and Environmental-Chemical Health)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Energy and Advanced Materials)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Economics and Management).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 5480–6480, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Engineering Experimental Classes (Computer and Intelligent Software, Future Information, High-End Equipment and Intelligent Manufacturing) as the main direction, with Tier 1 Excellence Program and Electrical Engineering as reach targets, and Tier 3 Mathematics and Physics Foundation and Economics and Management as safety options; for rankings significantly better than the lower bound (<5480), prioritize reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including Liberal Arts) were approximately 743 → 726 → 859 → 733 → 936, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend (increasing ranking numbers), with a cumulative shift of about 210 places in the last 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 936, the highest (easiest to enter) in the past 5 years; the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Guangxi was 12 in 2021, 10 in 2022, 10 in 2023, 8 in 2024, and 8 in 2025, showing a gradual reduction trend; the 2026 plan is 14, a significant increase of 6 (+75%) compared to 2025, which is a notable expansion and will significantly reduce competition intensity.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science main ranking is stable at 33–34, belonging to the upper-middle 985 level; 2026 reputation evaluation is "somewhat negative" (laboratory explosion incident); Douyin popularity ranking is 23rd (relatively popular); in 2023, there was controversy due to Zhang Xuefeng's advice against journalism majors, but the university's liberal arts enrollment majors mainly include law and journalism, Chinese language and literature, and foreign languages, so the impact of the journalism major advice is limited; Chongqing University is strong in engineering, with fewer advantageous liberal arts disciplines; law, journalism and communication, Chinese language and literature, etc., have not entered A- or above ratings, but still have some appeal due to the 985 platform.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has a socially recommended popularity (2024 popularity index 63.54), Chinese language and literature is recommended (60.0), liberal arts majors have medium-to-high popularity; Guangxi's 2026 History Category examinees are about 123,000, an increase of about 3,900 (+3.3%) compared to 2025, with the expansion of examinee scale partially offsetting the enrollment expansion. Chongqing and Guangxi are both in the Southwest region, geographically close, and have strong regional appeal for Guangxi liberal arts examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 936, the significant expansion of History Category in 2026 (+75%), and the increase of Guangxi History Category examinees by about 3.3%; considering that the large expansion may attract more examinees to apply, with appropriate correction, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 1277, with a range of 1085–1469.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Humanities Experimental Class (Law and Journalism)
- Chinese Language and Literature (Boya Class, including Chinese, History, Philosophy).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Marxist Theory
- English/Japanese/German (Foreign Language and Literature Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Within the predicted range of 1085–1469, it is recommended to focus on Law and Journalism and Chinese Language and Literature as main directions, with Marxist Theory and Foreign Language majors as safety options; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<1085), you can focus on sprinting for Law and Journalism.
